special_open_interface: A-E (66.1 Å C->N span; ATP-block/apo-block boundary in 7JQQ helical state)

design_rule.R1_never_sever_a_folding_unit: cut only at the N/C hinge (res ~201-228) or chain termini; cut-penalty must be low (<~33 severed long-range contacts). Cycle-1 cut@280 (penalty 66, inside C-domain) violated this.
design_rule.R2_join_only_spatially_adjacent_seats: a covalent junction may connect seat_i C-terminus to seat_{i+1} N-terminus only if the two seats are ring-adjacent; the A-E seam costs 66 Å and should be the free (non-covalent) break.
design_rule.R3_interface_is_>=3-subunit: each seat's N- and C-domains are held by BOTH flanking neighbors (N-N ring + C-C ring + cross A_C-B_N contacts). A covalent unit must therefore be scored embedded in the full ring, never in isolation (cycle-2 monomer floats 9.9 Å; 2-mer under-determines interface).

top_topologies.note: native-order fusion; joins only adjacent seats
